title: Measurement of thermo-optic properties of Y3Al5O12, Lu3Al5O12, YAlO3, LiYF4, LiLuF4, BaY2F8, KGd(WO4)2, and KY(WO4)2 laser crystals in the 80-300 K temperature range
relevance: YAGの熱物性(κ,dn/dT,α,Cp)の精密測定(80-300K)。熱レンズモデルの一次出典

extracted_values.physical_value_summary: κ, dn/dT, α, Cp for undoped and Yb-doped YAG (80-300K)

ai_summary.text: 多結晶を含むYAGの熱拡散率・比熱・熱伝導率・熱膨張・dn/dTの包括測定(80-300K)
